execute-script.function: x -> count(8).foreach(i -> { o = new(`DemoTypes:A`, transient: false); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#name`, 'Sample ' + ($i + 1)); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanMandatory`, $i % 2 == 0); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanRadioMandatory`, true); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanSelectMandatory`, false); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#boolean`, $i % 2 == 0); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#long`, ($i + 1) * 100); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#float`, ($i + 1) * 1.5); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#date`, date(2024, ($i % 12) + 1, ($i % 28) + 1)); $o.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#classificationSingle`, if($i % 3 == 0, `tl5.enum:tl.beacon.three#tl.beacon.three.green`, if($i % 3 == 1, `tl5.enum:tl.beacon.three#tl.beacon.three.yellow`, `tl5.enum:tl.beacon.three#tl.beacon.three.red`))); $o; })

x -> { obj = new(`DemoTypes:A`, transient: true); $obj.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanMandatory`, true); $obj.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanRadioMandatory`, true); $obj.set(`DemoTypes:DemoTypes.A#booleanSelectMandatory`, false); $obj; }
